description: You are the Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). The Data Monitoring Committee (DMC) has requested an urgent interim safety analysis. In OpenClinica (login: root / Admin123!), lock the 'Baseline Assessment' study events for subjects DM-101, DM-102, and DM-103 within the 'Phase II Diabetes Trial' study. Ensure that the 'Week 4 Follow-up' events for these subjects remain unlocked and that the study or entire subject records are not locked.
